title: Datetime Feature Extraction for Retail Sales

steps.content: The date column is already parsed as `datetime64`. Now let's run all tasks in one clean block.

{"output": "Feature engineering complete.
transaction_date  year  month  day_of_week  is_weekend  quarter  days_since_first_sale
      2023-01-01  2023      1            6           1        1                      0
      2023-01-02  2023      1            0           0        1                      1
      2023-01-03  2023      1            1           0        1                      2
      2023-01-04  2023      1            2           0        1                      3
      2023-01-05

tool_input.code:
# ── TASK 2: Extract datetime features ───────────────────────────────────────
df["year"]         = df["transaction_date"].dt.year
df["month"]        = df["transaction_date"].dt.month
df["day_of_week"]  = df["transaction_date"].dt.dayofweek          # 0=Mon … 6=Sun
df["is_weekend"]   = (df["day_of_week"] >= 5).astype(int)         # Sat=5, Sun=6
df["quarter"]      = df["transaction_date"].dt.quarter
first_date         = df["transaction_date"].min()
df["days_since_first_sale"] = (df["transaction_date"] - first_date).dt.days

print("Feature engineering complete.")
print(df[["transaction_date","year","month","day_of_week","is_weekend","quarter","days_since_first_sale"]].head(7).to_string(index=False))

tool_input.code:
# ── TASK 3: Average daily_sales by day_of_week ───────────────────────────────
day_names = {0:"Monday",1:"Tuesday",2:"Wednesday",3:"Thursday",4:"Friday",5:"Saturday",6:"Sunday"}

dow_avg = df.groupby("day_of_week")["daily_sales"].mean().round(2)
dow_avg.index = dow_avg.index.map(day_names)
dow_avg = dow_avg.rename("avg_daily_sales")

print("Average daily_sales by day_of_week:")
print(dow_avg.to_string())
print()
best_day = dow_avg.idxmax()
print(f"Highest average sales day: {best_day}  (${dow_avg[best_day]:,.2f})")

tool_input.code:
# ── TASK 4: Average daily_sales by is_weekend ────────────────────────────────
weekend_avg = df.groupby("is_weekend")["daily_sales"].mean().round(2)
weekend_avg.index = weekend_avg.index.map({0:"Weekday", 1:"Weekend"})
weekend_avg = weekend_avg.rename("avg_daily_sales")

print("Average daily_sales by is_weekend:")
print(weekend_avg.to_string())
print()
wd = weekend_avg["Weekday"]
we = weekend_avg["Weekend"]
diff = we - wd
pct  = diff / wd * 100
print(f"Weekday avg : ${wd:,.2f}")
print(f"Weekend avg : ${we:,.2f}")
print(f"Difference  : ${diff:,.2f}  ({pct:.1f}% higher on weekends)")
print(f"Weekends outperform weekdays: {we > wd}")

tool_input.code:
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score

# ── TASK 5: Linear regression using datetime features ────────────────────────
features = ["year", "month", "day_of_week", "is_weekend", "quarter", "days_since_first_sale"]

X = df[features].values
y = df["daily_sales"].values

model = LinearRegression()
model.fit(X, y)
y_pred = model.predict(X)
r2 = r2_score(y, y_pred)

print("Linear Regression — datetime features only")
print(f"R² Score : {r2:.6f}")
print()
print("Coefficients:")
for feat, coef in zip(features, model.coef_):
    print(f"  {feat:<25s}: {coef:>10.4f}")
print(f"  {'Intercept':<25s}: {model.intercept_:>10.4f}")

tool_input.code:
# Linear regression using scipy + numpy (no sklearn import needed)
features = ["year", "month", "day_of_week", "is_weekend", "quarter", "days_since_first_sale"]

X = df[features].values
y = df["daily_sales"].values

# Add intercept column
ones = np.ones((X.shape[0], 1))
X_aug = np.hstack([ones, X])

# OLS: beta = (X'X)^-1 X'y
beta, residuals, rank, sv = np.linalg.lstsq(X_aug, y, rcond=None)

y_pred = X_aug @ beta
ss_res = np.sum((y - y_pred) ** 2)
ss_tot = np.sum((y - y.mean()) ** 2)
r2 = 1 - ss_res / ss_tot

print("Linear Regression (OLS) — datetime features only")
print(f"R2 Score : {r2:.6f}")
print()
print("Coefficients:")
feat_names = ["Intercept"] + features
for name, coef in zip(feat_names, beta):
    print(f"  {name:<30s}: {coef:>12.4f}")

features = ["year","month","day_of_week","is_weekend","quarter","days_since_first_sale"]
X = df[features].values
y = df["daily_sales"].values
ones = np.ones((X.shape[0], 1))
X_aug = np.hstack([ones, X])
beta = np.linalg.lstsq(X_aug, y, rcond=None)[0]
y_pred = X_aug.dot(beta)
ss_res = ((y - y_pred)**2).sum()
ss_tot = ((y - y.mean())**2).sum()
r2 = 1.0 - ss_res/ss_tot
print(r2)
